{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323033746FB3454D0ADEBF30AFB29"}"},"total":5451},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7591273077930853145","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":""这部小说像一扇任意门——推开的瞬间，文字便在时光里酿出琥珀色的光。人物在纸页间呼吸，情节如星河倾泻，连配角都带着毛茸茸的真实感。合上书时，发现自己的心跳曾与书中某个瞬间同频共振。"
"这小说绝了！剧情爽点密集得像暴雨，反转多到我疯狂截图存档！主角智商全程在线，配角个个有血有肉，连反派都让人又恨又怜。"作者笔力惊人！环境描写让场景跃然纸上，人物微表情刻画精准到睫毛颤动。伏笔回收时像精密齿轮咬合，世界观设定自洽到能当论文考据——这哪是小说？分明是文字筑成的平行宇宙！"
"读完只想说：作者写爽了，读者看嗨了，文学性和可读性居然能如此平衡。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767486480,"group_id":"7583949514948496409","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生这条路上，只有奋斗能给你安全感","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyCA9zf3ZkpQ/IcZBQA04Q00eC49IAKC1gWEAuQsD+zz","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3afccc2b8742488e966c75d45a237f26~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790336&x-signature=IOzxJBB926lnWcOQUlauX1FgAfA%3D","user_id":"3536495954636999","user_name":"赛博女丸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3536495954636999","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1734420775,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583949514948496409","book_info":{"abstract":"【词条抽取+模拟器+全部继承+仙武】
陈奕穿越武道世界，获得了一个一年抽一个词条的系统。
可惜抽到的全是没啥用的白色词条，高品质词条概率很低，最高的神话词条甚至只有0.001%！
要提升概率必须提升武道境界，可他没有根骨无法修炼。
十八岁这年，陈奕不幸落入黑帮手中，被迫做苦力。
眼看这辈子就要这么凄凉下去，人生的第18个词条，竟抽出了神话词条——模拟器！
模拟里每过一年竟然也能抽一个词条，模拟结束会继承全部词条和武道境界！
第一次模拟，陈奕拼了命的活着，多活一年就能多一个词条！
终于，满头华发时，抽到了梦寐以求的词条——低阶根骨！
“哈哈哈！莫欺老年穷，开始修炼，继承修为！”
……
从此，陈奕不断模拟不断抽，武道境界节节高！
史诗、传说，乃至神话词条纷纷收入囊中！
“什么妖族魔族？什么黑暗动乱？我不知道啊，他们喊着‘凭什么你能成仙啊’就冲上来了，粘在我拳头上甩也甩不开，视野盲区，减速带，和我的模拟器说吧，我们都在用力的活着，我都这么用力了他们怎么还活着？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f5fa61631ceb462d9c77a2470bef353a","author":"六大六子","author_id":"","book_id":"7583949514948496409","book_name":"说好一年一词条，万词王什么鬼","book_short_name":"让词条飞一会","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"91.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7583949571730965017","read_count":"915367","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"562461"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"263","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f66c960dfc1d875799942e18ad259717~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392266&x-signature=gHqSPXplRwh2jJflv385eoPbjL4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"333866553063758","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"84"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323033746FB3454D0ADEBF30AFB29"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":36,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12586,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15272,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":66596},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589568297875325758","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"模拟器文，写的不错，在同类型的小说里面算是质量高的，每次模拟都有不同的剧情，很有细节，没有重复水，剧情人设文笔都不错，主角的这个词条系统蛮有意思。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767088434,"group_id":"7583949514948496409","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"荤素不忌题材通吃但是烂文滚出我的书架","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/nCMde+iWQRy2wcD9+FLsSIyDYlWTPxdf617bitEPK4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/21d1153b272449fc8edbb011a431b9db~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793685&x-signature=crTedcIAJ59jVWEigPAMhz3C5Tg%3D","user_id":"3047501522799084","user_name":"白给之王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3047501522799084","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583949514948496409","book_info":{"abstract":"【词条抽取+模拟器+全部继承+仙武】
